JNJ substitute — pre-tax income from continuing ops. OperatingIncomeLoss stopped being filed by JNJ after FY2012.
CVX substitute — pre-tax income including equity method investments. CVX does not file OperatingIncomeLoss.
PSX substitute — domestic pre-tax income used when OperatingIncomeLoss is absent
CASY substitute — pre-tax income from parent; OperatingIncomeLoss not filed. Non-operating items negligible (<$1M interest).
JNJ post-Kenvue reclassification. Also covers other companies using nonoperating classification.

general fallback — fixes ANET/DAL and others where PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment is stale
PEG substitute — utility D&A as cost-of-goods line item; acts as complete aggregate when DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization is absent/stale
PCG — duplicate entry at lower priority to handle staleness fallback
fallback complete D&A for tickers that switched to DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization in recent years (e.g. UPS pre-2023)
most accurate — annual average including dilution. Required for EPS so available for almost all companies. Matches FMP weightedAverageShsOutDil exactly.

column6: less preferred than diluted but widely available.
